set.body:
Child of bd-01KXZQCRJQ02WXW3PRY5BTQY5K.

Goal: expose a safe low-level destination tier beneath Gale's ordinary allocating matrix operations.

Scope and acceptance:
- Add matrix-matrix destination operations using DMatBuilder or an equivalently single-owner destination, including GEMM and fused scale/add use cases.
- Make replacement versus accumulation semantics explicit, including alpha/beta and NaN behavior.
- Reject shape mismatch, closed destinations, and unsupported aliasing deterministically.
- Accept row-major, transposed, and strided inputs.
- Preserve pure, Vector, and native backend routing and numerical conformance.
- Demonstrate zero intermediate allocation after caller destination/workspace setup on the evidence-selected paths.
- Keep existing high-level operators source-compatible and allocating.
set.title: Add allocation-controlled dense matrix destination operations
